warnings.issue: Penalty income double-counted: handlePenaltyApplied credits Penalty Income at application, and handleLoanRepayment credits Penalty Income again at payment. One should use a Penalty Receivable intermediary.
executeProcessing() is ~175 lines with mixed concerns (interest accrual, penalty application, defaulting, closing). Should be decomposed.
processLoan() duplicates penalty logic from executeProcessing(). Risk of divergence if penalty rules change.
Log message reports unpaidPenalties.size() (total unpaid) rather than actual count paid.
